name: Eternal Pilgrimage

abilities.name: Surplus of Life
abilities.text: When this model heals, it may reduce the amount healed to 0. If it does so, this model gains a Life token.

abilities.name: Cursed to Wander
abilities.text: When this model heals in excess of its maximum health, it may move up to 2".

actions.name: Unclaimed Soul
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Target a friendly Lamp marker. Name a friendly non-master model killed this game.
actions.effects: Summon the named model with 4 health in base contact with the target, then remove the target.

tokens.name: Life
tokens.text: When this model heals, it may reduce the amount healed to 0. If it does so, this model gains a Life token.

extraction_notes: Life token definition inferred from Surplus of Life ability text
Faction not explicitly stated on card
Unclaimed Soul uses diamond-diamond icon for signature action
